# Quralhub — Қазақстан құралдар платформасы

> Kazakhstan's all-in-one tools platform with 27+ free calculators, comparisons, and utilities. All calculations follow the 2026 Kazakhstan Tax Code (Law №214-VIII).

## About
Quralhub (құрал = tool in Kazakh) provides free online tools for Kazakhstan citizens: salary calculators, tax calculators, mortgage estimators, currency converters, telecom comparisons, Kazakh language tools, document generators, and more. Updated for 2026 tax year.

## Key Data (2026)
- MRP (Monthly Calculation Index): 4,325 KZT
- MZP (Minimum Wage): 85,000 KZT
- VAT: 16% (was 12% in 2025)
- IPN (Income Tax): 10% up to 8,500 MRP/year, 15% above
- IPN Deduction: 30 MRP = 129,750 KZT
- OPVR (Employer Pension): 3.5% (was 1.5%)
- Self-employed: IPN 0%, only social payments, max 340 MRP/month
- Simplified tax (IP): 4% (was 3%)
- Patent regime: ABOLISHED from 2026

## Tools

### Financial Calculators
- /salary — Salary calculator (net pay from gross and reverse, with OPV 10%, IPN 10-15%, VOSMS 2%, OPVR 3.5%)
- /vat — VAT 16% calculator (add or extract, rates: 16% main, 5% medical, 10% press)
- /mrp — MRP to Tenge converter (1 MRP = 4,325 KZT in 2026)
- /tax — IP tax calculator (simplified 4%, self-employed 0%)
- /selfemployed — Self-employed calculator (IPN 0%, social payments only)
- /kaspi — Kaspi Red installment calculator (3-24 months)
- /vacation — Vacation pay calculator (Labor Code Art. 91)
- /maternity — Maternity pay calculator (birth leave + child care + birth grant)

### Property & Utilities
- /mortgage — Mortgage calculator (Otbasy Bank 5%, 7-20-25 program 7%, commercial 18-21%)
- /transport — Transport tax (2026 coefficients: 10-20 years ×0.7, 20+ years ×0.5)
- /communal — Utility bills calculator (8 cities: electricity, water, gas, heating)
- /customs — Car import customs calculator (EAEU tariffs)

### Banking & Telecom
- /currency — Currency converter (USD/EUR/RUB/CNY, National Bank rates)
- /bankdep — Bank deposit comparison (14+ banks)
- /bankcred — Bank credit comparison (consumer, mortgage, auto loans)
- /connect — Telecom tariff comparison (mobile operators + home ISP)

### Marketplace & Business
- /marketplace — Marketplace margin calculator (Kaspi Магазин, Wildberries, Ozon — commission, logistics, packaging, profit, margin, ROI)

### Traffic Fines
- /fines — Traffic fines calculator (25+ violations: speed, parking, documents, safety, alcohol, signals. MRP-based amounts with 50% early payment discount within 7 days)

### Auto License Plates
- /plates — Kazakhstan license plate prices 2026 (standard 3,975₸, choice 129,750₸, VIP 432,500₸, premium 865,000₸. 20 regions, registration fee 5,406₸, online via Egov.kz)

### Kazakh Language Tools
- /aitools — AI Translator (KAZ↔RUS↔ENG) + Cyrillic↔Latin converter + Spell checker
- /septik — Kazakh noun declension (7 cases: words, numbers, positions, months, weekdays)
- /propisyu — Numbers and dates in Kazakh words
- /holidays — 2026 Kazakhstan holiday calendar (14 official holidays)
- /calendars — Extended calendars 2026 (holidays, 20+ professional days, school calendar 2026-2027 with terms/breaks, tax deadlines with НДС/КПН/ИПН/910.00 due dates)

### Documents & Utilities
- /doctemplates — Official document templates (20+ types: applications, orders, contracts, letters)
- /resume — Resume/CV builder (Kazakh format)
- /invoice — Invoice generator (with VAT 16%)
- /qr — QR code generator (URL, WiFi, WhatsApp, Phone)
- /pdf — PDF tools (merge, split, compress, rotate, watermark, page numbers)
- /passgen — Secure password generator

## Languages
- Kazakh (қазақша) — primary
- Russian (русский) — toggle available

## Guides (SEO Articles)
- /guides — All guides index
- /guides/salary-guide-2026 — Salary calculation 2026 full guide (OPV, IPN 10-15%, VOSMS, step-by-step with 350,000₸ example)
- /guides/ip-open-2026 — How to register IP/self-employed in Kazakhstan 2026 (eGov, Kaspi Business, CON)
- /guides/nds-16-2026 — VAT 16% changes in 2026 (was 12%, reduced rates 5%/10%, threshold 10,000 MRP)
- /guides/deposit-compare-2026 — Best bank deposits March 2026 (TOP-5 by GAER, KDIF guarantee)
- /guides/mortgage-programs-2026 — Mortgage programs 2026 (Otbasy Bank 5%, 7-20-25 at 7%, commercial 16-21%)
- /guides/fines-table-2026 — Traffic fines 2026 complete table in MRP (50% discount rule, how to check/pay)

## Contact
- Website: quralhub.kz
- Platform: Quralhub
